raw_block:
–1. The high priest during the time of David’ s reign2Sa 19:11;20:25;1Ch 15:11;16:39
  .Removes the ark of the covenant from Jerusalem at the time of 
Absalom’ s usurpation; returns with the ark of the covenant at David’ s command2Sa 15:24-36;17:15,17-21
  .Stands aloof from Adonijah at the time of his attempted usurpation1Ki 1:8,26
  .Summoned by David to anoint Solomon to be king1Ki 
1:32-40,44,45
  .Performs the function of a high priest after Abiathar was deposed 
by Solomon1Ki 2:35;1Ch 29:22
–2. Father of Jerusha2Ki 15:33;2Ch 27:1
–3. Son of Ahitub1Ch 6:12
–4. A man of valor1Ch 12:28
–5. Son of BaanaNe 3:4
–6. A priestNe 3:29
–7. A returned exileNe 10:21
–8. Son of MeraiothNe 11:11
–9. A treasurer of the templeNe 13:13
